articles.title: Forbes now owns real estate inside the Metaverse
articles.description: Forbes has staked its claim within the Metaverse, specifically setting up shop in The Sandbox. This venture is a full-blown cannonball, establishing a permanent residence that screams luxury, innovation, and a hefty dose of forward-thinking. The century-old business magazine is no stranger to leading the pack, and its latest move into The Sandbox metaverse is […]

articles.title: Hedera (HBAR) Soars 50% To Mark New 20-Month High, Fuels Bullish Price Targets
articles.description: Hedera (HBAR), a decentralized public network known for its near real-time consensus and developer-friendly environment, has emerged as one of the top-performing altcoins in the cryptocurrency market. As the overall market experiences a resurgence of bullish sentiment, HBAR has demonstrated impressive growth, positioning itself as one of the leaders among the top 100 cryptocurrencies by...

articles.title: XRP, Solana, Cardano, Shiba Inu Making Up for Lost Time as Big Whale Transaction Spikes Pop Up
articles.description: As the crypto market continues to enjoy notable bullish momentum, altcoins are riding on this wave thanks to heightened whale transactions.

articles.title: Ethereum 2019 Correction Repeating? Analyst Warns Ethereum May See Larger Pullback
articles.description: Closely followed analyst Benjamin Cowen says Ethereum may be in the midst of repeating a historical pattern that could bring ETH down to much lower levels. In a new strategy session, Cowen tells his 790,000 YouTube subscribers that in the last crypto bear market, Ethereum didn’t bottom out until canceling out a previous breakout from […]

articles.title: Gaming Tokens Ride Bitcoin, Ethereum Boom to All-Time High Prices
articles.description: The tokens for Xai, Beam, Heroes of Mavia, and Parallel all popped to new peaks amid Bitcoin buzz and the PIXEL launch.

articles.title: Forbes launches permanent metaverse presence featuring ‘luxurious pool,’ ‘elegant bar’
articles.description: The Hong Kong-owned magazine now owns virtual real-estate in the Sandbox Metaverse.

articles.title: Chiliz Leaps onto K League Popularity to Expand into Korea
articles.description: Chiliz celebrates the increasing prominence of Korean football by announcing a collaboration with the K League to elevate fan engagement.

articles.title: Ethereum Likely The Only Spot Crypto ETF To Be Approved After Bitcoin: Bernstein
articles.description: Wealth management firm Bernstein suggested Ethereum (ETH) may be the only digital asset after Bitcoin (BTC) to secure a spot ETF.

articles.title: Worldcoin's Value Jumps Over Amid Crypto Market Rise
articles.description: Worldcoin soars as Bitcoin leads market surge

articles.title: Sui Overtakes Aptos, Cardano in Value Locked; Sees $310M Inflow in 30 Days
articles.description: Sui, the layer 1 blockchain built by a group of former Meta (META) employees, has experienced a cascade of inflows this month in a spike that has seen it overtake Cardano, Near and Aptos in terms of total value locked (TVL).

articles.title: Worldcoin soars 140% in a week as wallet app hits 1M daily users
articles.description: The price of Worldcoin’s WLD token has surged 141% in the past seven days as the firm notched a daily active user milestone.
